Mockup A · Centered Modal · Horizontal Tabs

</> Code View Generated from your current configuration

executor: claude-sonnet-4-6 advisor: claude-opus-4-6 effort: medium max_uses: 3 caching: 5m max_tokens: 8192 
import Anthropic from "@anthropic-ai/sdk";

const client = new Anthropic({
  apiKey: process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY,
});

// Edit this to change what you send to the model.
const prompt = "prompt here";

const response = await client.beta.messages.create(
  {
    model: "claude-sonnet-4-6",
    max_tokens: 8192,
    system: "You have access to an advisor tool. Call it before finalizing answers.",
    output_config: { effort: "medium" },
    tools: [
      {
        type: "advisor_20260301",
        name: "advisor",
        model: "claude-opus-4-6",
        max_uses: 3,
        caching: { type: "ephemeral", ttl: "5m" },
      },
    ],
    messages: [
      { role: "user", content: prompt },
    ],
  },
  { betas: ["advisor-tool-2026-03-01"] }
);

console.log(response);

import os
from anthropic import Anthropic

client = Anthropic(api_key=os.environ["ANTHROPIC_API_KEY"])

# Edit this to change what you send to the model.
prompt = "prompt here"

response = client.beta.messages.create(
    model="claude-sonnet-4-6",
    max_tokens=8192,
    system="You have access to an advisor tool. Call it before finalizing answers.",
    output_config={"effort": "medium"},
    tools=[
        {
            "type": "advisor_20260301",
            "name": "advisor",
            "model": "claude-opus-4-6",
            "max_uses": 3,
            "caching": {"type": "ephemeral", "ttl": "5m"},
        }
    ],
    messages=[
        {"role": "user", "content": prompt},
    ],
    betas=["advisor-tool-2026-03-01"],
)

print(response)

# Edit this to change what you send to the model.
PROMPT="prompt here"

curl https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages \
  --header "x-api-key: $ANTHROPIC_API_KEY" \
  --header "anthropic-version: 2023-06-01" \
  --header "anthropic-beta: advisor-tool-2026-03-01" \
  --header "content-type: application/json" \
  --data @- <<EOF
{
  "model": "claude-sonnet-4-6",
  "max_tokens": 8192,
  "system": "You have access to an advisor tool. Call it before finalizing answers.",
  "output_config": { "effort": "medium" },
  "tools": [
    {
      "type": "advisor_20260301",
      "name": "advisor",
      "model": "claude-opus-4-6",
      "max_uses": 3,
      "caching": { "type": "ephemeral", "ttl": "5m" }
    }
  ],
  "messages": [
    { "role": "user", "content": "$PROMPT" }
  ]
}
EOF
Replace "prompt here" with your actual user message. Anthropic advisor tool docs →
